title: SshDocument
description: Defines a reusable script or multi-step automation for remote SSH execution.

content.description: Script or command body for Command documents. Use {{ paramName }} for parameter references.

mainSteps.description: Named execution steps for Automation documents. Executed in order; stops on first failure.

parameters.description: Parameter definitions accepted by this document.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this document does.

DocumentStep.description: A named execution step within an Automation document.

name.description: Step identifier. Used in logs and state.

action.description: Action to perform. Only ssh:runShellScript is supported.

scriptRef.description: Name of the SSH::Exec::ShellScript to execute. Populated via script.attrName token at synthesis — creates ordering dependency in the engine DAG.

RunShellScriptInputs.description: Inputs for ssh:runShellScript. runCommand is inlined from the ShellScript at synthesis time.

runCommand.description: Shell commands to execute. Inlined from the referenced ShellScript's runCommand at synthesis time.
